<!-- ========== ABOUT ME ========== -->
## 🐬 About Me

I'm **Diego Mwangi**, a **Associate Professor** in the **Department of Business Administration** at [University of Finance – Marketing (UFM)](https://ufm.edu.vn). Since **December 29, 2022** (**4+ years** of experience), I've been navigating the vast ocean of knowledge with my students.

Each academic year, I guide students through **6 courses** totaling **18 credits**, equipping them with practical skills and deep understanding. Like the ocean — deep, vast, and full of discoveries!

> *"Education is the most powerful weapon which you can use to change the world."*
> — **Nelson Mandela**

---

<!-- ========== COURSES SEMESTER 1 ========== -->
## 📚 Courses — Academic Year 2025-2026

> 📌 **Teaching Load:** 3 courses × 2 semesters = **6 courses / 18 credit hours** per year

### 🌊 Semester 1 — Fall 2025

| # | Code | Course | Credits | Focus Areas |
|:-:|------|--------|:-------:|-------------|
| 1 | `BA202` | **Quản trị nguồn nhân lực** *(Human Resource Management)* | 3 | Recruitment, Training, Performance Appraisal, Compensation, Labor Law |
| 2 | `BA404` | **Chuyển đổi số trong doanh nghiệp** *(Digital Transformation in Business)* | 3 | Technology Adoption, Data-driven Decision Making, Platform Economy |
| 3 | `BA402` | **Khởi nghiệp và đổi mới sáng tạo** *(Entrepreneurship & Innovation)* | 3 | Business Model Canvas, Lean Startup, Design Thinking, Funding |

> **Semester 1 Total:** 3 courses · 9 credit hours

---

### 🐚 Semester 2 — Spring 2026

| # | Code | Course | Credits | Focus Areas |
|:-:|------|--------|:-------:|-------------|
| 1 | `BA407` | **Tư duy thiết kế trong kinh doanh** *(Design Thinking in Business)* | 3 | Empathize, Define, Ideate, Prototype, Test, Service Innovation |
| 2 | `BA301` | **Hành vi tổ chức** *(Organizational Behavior)* | 3 | Motivation, Leadership, Teams, Organizational Culture, Change |
| 3 | `BA406` | **Thương lượng và kỹ năng kinh doanh** *(Business Negotiation Skills)* | 2 | Negotiation Strategies, BATNA, Cross-cultural Negotiation, Conflict Resolution |

> **Semester 2 Total:** 3 courses · 8 credit hours

---
